query: Be brutal and pressure test this startup idea for an AI procurement copilot. Tell me whether it survives realistic CAC, sales-cycle, and runway assumptions.
rationale: This is a startup survivability teardown, so startup-pressure-test should win.

query: I need the first strategic blueprint and MVP shape for a brand-new product idea.
rationale: Raw product ideation belongs in greenfield-product/product-blueprint.

query: We already validated the blueprint. Turn it into a PRD with user stories, acceptance criteria, and edge cases.
rationale: Validated blueprint-to-requirements work belongs in greenfield-product/requirements-writer.

query: A validated PRD exists. Define the schema, API contracts, state flows, and infrastructure for v1.
rationale: Validated PRD-to-system-design work belongs in greenfield-product/system-architect.

query: We need to set up a cross-session planner/generator/evaluator loop for implementation.
rationale: Execution governance belongs in `using-agents-stack`, not greenfield-product.
